message:
fix: Bundle ipaddress.py in stdlib-fs for urllib.parse support

urllib.parse imports ipaddress at module load time but ipaddress.py
was not included in the stdlib bundle, causing ImportError for any
URL parsing code. ipaddress.py is pure Python (only depends on
functools which is already bundled).

Updated generate-stdlib-fs.sh to include ipaddress.py and updated
the urllib.parse test to assert full functionality.

files.patch:
@@ -80,6 +80,7 @@ BOOT_FILES=(
     # url
     "urllib/__init__.py"
     "urllib/parse.py"
+    "ipaddress.py"
     # import machinery (needed for pymode._handler)
     "importlib/__init__.py"
     "importlib/_bootstrap.py"
